home.title: Ancient Vedic Legacy. Modern Divine Experience.
home.subtitle: Discover and connect with qualified Vaidika Pujaris to perform sacred Vedic rituals and pujas, preserving our ancient traditions for generations to come.
home.no_pujas_found: No pujas found matching your search.
home.no_pujas_in_category: No pujas found in this category.
pujari.chat_coming_soon: In-app chat functionality is under development.
home.how_it_works_step1_desc: Browse our extensive library of Vedic pujas and rituals. Use our search and filters to find the perfect ceremony for your needs.
home.how_it_works_step2_desc: We connect you with experienced and qualified Vaidika Pujaris who can perform the ceremony for you, either in-person or online.
home.how_it_works_step3_desc: Receive blessings and experience the spiritual benefits of ancient Vedic traditions performed authentically and with devotion.
home.map_desc: Explore our network of skilled pujaris. The map below shows a selection of our available experts.
